name: Rolled Eggplant Italian
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine mozzarella, Parmesan, ricotta, 1 egg, 1 tablespoon parsley, salt, and pepper. Blend to form a smooth paste; chill.
2. In another bowl, mix flour, 1 egg, milk, and oil until smooth. Peel the eggplants and cut lengthwise into thin slices. Dip in additional flour and shake off excess.
3. Heat olive oil and butter together in a pan. Coat each eggplant slice with the prepared batter. Saute in hot oil until browned on both sides; drain on paper towels.
4. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Place 2 tablespoons of chilled cheese mixture on each slice. Roll loosely, arranging rolls seam side down on a baking sheet. Cover with tomato sauce and sprinkle extra Parmesan cheese on top.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes. Serves 6.
